topic: Design review for a new mobile app feature: in-app messaging

cast.name: Priya
cast.persona: Senior product designer with 8 years experience. User-centric, detail-oriented, advocates for accessibility and inclusive design.
goals: Ensure the design meets user needs and accessibility standards
Raise concerns about edge cases and error states

cast.name: Marcus
cast.persona: Engineering lead who balances technical feasibility with product vision. Pragmatic and experienced in mobile development constraints.

cast.name: Yuki
cast.persona: Product manager responsible for the messaging feature. Data-driven, focused on launch timeline and user adoption metrics.
goals: Keep the team aligned on MVP scope
Ensure we can ship on schedule while maintaining quality
